sentence: 每个主日他们全家都会去教堂做礼拜。
pinyin: Měi gè zhǔ rì tāmen quánjiā dōu huì qù jiàotáng zuò lǐbài.
english: Every Sunday the whole family goes to church for worship.

sentence: 他在大学专门研究儒家经学，发表了不少论文。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhuānmén yánjiū rújiā jīngxué, fābiǎo le bù shǎo lùnwén.
english: He specializes in Confucian classical studies at the university and has published quite a few papers.

meaning: 1. enclosed carriage for carrying passengers; 2. motor carriage; 3. ca
sentence: 他买了一辆白色的轿车。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī liàng bái sè de jiào chē.

sentence: 我去邮政局寄了一个包裹。
pinyin: Wǒ qù yóu zhèng jú jì le yī ge bāo guǒ.
english: I went to the post office to send a parcel.

sentence: 医生推荐了一种新的物理疗法。
pinyin: Yīshēng tuījiàn le yī zhǒng xīn de wùlǐ liáofǎ.
english: The doctor recommended a new kind of physical therapy.
